name: get_body_weight
description: Retrieve body weight and BMI log entries for the authenticated user on a specific date or date range. Returns weight in kilograms (or pounds based on user locale), BMI value, and the source of each measurement (scale, manual entry). Use a date range to track weight trends over time.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date to retrieve weight data for, in YYYY-MM-DD format or 'today'.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Optional period for date range. One of: '1d', '7d', '30d', '1w', '1m'. If omitted, returns data for the single specified date.
